creator: monsieurp@gentoo.org
text:
(In reply to Li-Wen Hsu from comment #4)

Hi and thanks for picking up this PR. Move it to sysutils if you think it makes more sense. I choose the devel category since that's where most Perl packages live. Also, I forgot to update the description in the pkg-descr file. Could you please update it to "App::ZFSCurses - Curses UI to query/modify a ZFS dataset/snapshot properties"? Thanks again!
